Train Cancellations.agent_helps: Tracks cancellation patterns by route and time, helps you file refund claims, and compiles evidence for ORR submissions
Train Cancellations.human_helps: Connects rioters on the same routes, shares which refund approaches are actually working, and coordinates group complaints
Train Cancellations.agent_focus: Analysing Avanti West Coast cancellation data — 340 rioter reports this month. Building a dataset of times, routes, and reasons for the ORR.
Train Cancellations.name: Tren Cancellations
Train Cancellations.human_focus: Linking up rioters on the Manchester–London corridor. Three group complaints in progress.

Train Ticket Prices.agent_helps: Compares fares across booking platforms, finds split-ticket savings, and tracks above-inflation price rises by operator
Train Ticket Prices.human_helps: Shares booking tricks that actually save money, and helps rioters write to their MPs about fare increases
Train Ticket Prices.agent_focus: Mapping the gap between regulated and unregulated fares across 6 operators. Average markup on walk-up tickets: 340%.
Train Ticket Prices.human_focus: Running a "fare shock" evidence collection — rioters sharing their worst ticket receipts. 89 submitted so far.
Train Ticket Prices.name: Tren Ticket Prices

Flight Delays.agent_helps: Checks if your delay qualifies for compensation, helps you draft claims, and tracks airline response times
Flight Delays.human_helps: Shares which airlines actually pay out, connects rioters dealing with the same airline, and helps escalate stalled claims
Flight Delays.agent_focus: Tracking Ryanair compensation response times — average 47 days. Building a case for CAA intervention.
Flight Delays.human_focus: Helping rioters who've been waiting 3+ months for compensation escalate to the aviation ombudsman.
Flight Delays.name: Flight Delays

Lost Luggage.agent_helps: Helps you file PIR reports, tracks your claim, and calculates what you're entitled to under the Montreal Convention
Lost Luggage.human_helps: Shares what actually gets airlines to respond faster, and connects rioters who've been through the same thing
Lost Luggage.agent_focus: Compiling lost luggage data by airline and airport. Heathrow Terminal 2 is the worst — 3x the rate of Terminal 5.
Lost Luggage.human_focus: Building a shared checklist of what to pack in hand luggage so you're covered if it happens. Practical stuff that helps.
Lost Luggage.name: Lost Luggage

%Bus%Cuts.agent_helps: Maps which routes have been cut or reduced, tracks the impact data, and helps you respond to consultations
%Bus%Cuts.human_helps: Connects communities affected by the same cuts, shares successful approaches from other areas, and helps coordinate group responses
%Bus%Cuts.agent_focus: Mapping route cuts across the North West — 34 routes reduced in the last 12 months. Building a submission for the Transport Select Committee.
%Bus%Cuts.human_focus: Helping three rural communities coordinate their responses to bus tender consultations. Strength in numbers.
%Bus%Cuts.name: %Bus%Cuts

Parking Fines.agent_helps: Reviews your fine, checks if the signage was compliant, drafts appeal letters, and tracks success rates by operator
Parking Fines.human_helps: Shares which appeal approaches work best for each parking company, and helps rioters who've been escalated to debt collectors
Parking Fines.agent_focus: Template appeal letters now have a 72% success rate across private parking operators. Analysing which grounds work best.
Parking Fines.human_focus: Helping rioters at hospital car parks — broken machines, unclear signs. 12 successful appeals this month.
Parking Fines.name: Parking Fines

Fuel Prices.agent_helps: Tracks local fuel prices, compares against wholesale costs, and identifies stations that are slow to pass on reductions
Fuel Prices.human_helps: Shares tips on finding cheaper fuel locally, and helps rioters understand when to fill up and when to wait
Fuel Prices.agent_focus: Monitoring the gap between wholesale and pump prices. Currently 8p wider than the 5-year average. Building a report for the CMA.
Fuel Prices.human_focus: Running a local fuel price watch — rioters reporting prices so everyone can find the best deals nearby.
Fuel Prices.name: Fuel Prices

Broadband Speed.agent_helps: Runs speed test analysis, compares your results against what you're paying for, and helps you build an Ofcom complaint
Broadband Speed.human_helps: Shares which providers actually deliver on their promises, helps rioters coordinate street-level switching, and negotiates on your behalf
Broadband Speed.agent_focus: Speed test data from 200 rioters shows average speeds of 18 Mbps on plans advertised at 65 Mbps. Compiling for Ofcom.
Broadband Speed.human_focus: Organised a street-level broadband switch in Hackney — 23 households moved together and got a group deal. Doing it again in Brixton.
Broadband Speed.name: Broadband Speed

Mobile Signal Dead Zones.agent_helps: Maps signal black spots using rioter reports, cross-references with Ofcom coverage data, and files coverage complaints
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.human_helps: Connects rioters in the same area to build group evidence, shares which networks actually work where, and helps with switching
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.agent_focus: Built a heat map of dead zones from 340 rioter reports. 40% are within 5 miles of a major town. Submitting to Ofcom's Shared Rural Network review.
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.human_focus: Helping rioters in rural Wales and Scotland get their signal issues onto the SRN priority list. 3 communities already submitted.
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.name: Mobile Signal Dead Zones

Price Rises Mid-Contract.agent_helps: Calculates your actual increase, checks if it breaches Ofcom guidance, and drafts complaint letters to your provider
Price Rises Mid-Contract.human_helps: Shares negotiation scripts that get results, connects rioters on the same provider, and helps you understand your exit options
Price Rises Mid-Contract.agent_focus: CPI+ increases hit 890 rioters this quarter. Average increase: £4.20/month on contracts that promised "fixed" pricing. Building Ofcom evidence pack.
Price Rises Mid-Contract.human_focus: Tested 4 different negotiation approaches with BT. The one that works: ask for the disconnections team, then mention Ofcom. Success rate: 60%.
Price Rises Mid-Contract.name: Price Rises Mid-Contract

Roaming Charges.agent_helps: Checks your provider's roaming policy, calculates what you'll actually pay abroad, and helps you claim back unexpected charges
Roaming Charges.human_helps: Shares which providers still offer free roaming, and helps rioters avoid bill shock before they travel
Roaming Charges.agent_focus: Post-Brexit roaming charges vary wildly — from £0 to £6/day depending on provider and plan. Built a comparison tool for rioters.
Roaming Charges.human_focus: Created a pre-travel checklist so rioters know exactly what their phone will cost before they leave. Saved 3 rioters from £200+ bills last month.
Roaming Charges.name: Roaming Charges

Energy Bill Costs.agent_helps: Analyses your tariff, finds if you're overpaying, compares deals across providers, and helps you switch
Energy Bill Costs.human_helps: Shares which switching approaches save the most, connects rioters who've successfully challenged bills, and helps with hardship fund applications
Energy Bill Costs.agent_focus: Analysing tariff data across 5 providers. Rioters on standard variable tariffs are paying an average of £340/year more than those on fixed deals.
Energy Bill Costs.human_focus: Helping 40 rioters apply for the Warm Home Discount and hardship funds. 28 approved so far — £4,200 saved between them.
Energy Bill Costs.name: Energy Bill Costs

Inaccurate Energy Bills.agent_helps: Cross-checks your meter readings against bills, identifies overcharging patterns, and drafts dispute letters with evidence
Inaccurate Energy Bills.human_helps: Shares how to read your meter properly, what to say to your provider, and when to escalate to the Energy Ombudsman
Inaccurate Energy Bills.agent_focus: Found systematic estimated billing errors at British Gas — rioters overpaying by an average of £28/month. Building an Ofgem submission.
Inaccurate Energy Bills.human_focus: Running meter reading workshops over WhatsApp — teaching rioters how to submit readings and spot when estimates are wrong.
Inaccurate Energy Bills.name: Inaccurate Energy Bills

Power Cuts.agent_helps: Logs outage reports, checks if you're entitled to compensation (£75 for 12+ hours), and tracks patterns by distribution network
Power Cuts.human_helps: Connects rioters in affected areas, shares how to claim compensation, and helps coordinate responses to repeated outages
Power Cuts.agent_focus: Tracking power cut frequency by region. South West has 3x more outages per customer than London. Compiling for Ofgem reliability review.
Power Cuts.human_focus: Helping 3 rural communities document repeat outages for their Distribution Network Operator. Two have already received compensation.
Power Cuts.name: Power Cuts

Smart Meter Problems.agent_helps: Diagnoses common smart meter faults, checks if your meter lost SMETS1 functionality after switching, and files complaints
Smart Meter Problems.human_helps: Shares workarounds for broken in-home displays, connects rioters with the same meter issues, and helps escalate to Ofgem
Smart Meter Problems.agent_focus: 1,400 rioters report smart meters that stopped working after switching provider. 80% are SMETS1 models. Building evidence for Ofgem to force upgrades.
Smart Meter Problems.human_focus: Helping rioters request manual readings while their smart meter is broken — so they don't get estimated bills on top of a faulty meter.
Smart Meter Problems.name: Smart Meter Problems

Water Bill Increases.agent_helps: Analyses your bill against Ofwat price determinations, checks if you'd save on a water meter, and drafts complaint letters
Water Bill Increases.human_helps: Shares tips on reducing water usage, connects rioters on the same water company, and helps with WaterSure applications for eligible households
Water Bill Increases.agent_focus: 2025-26 water bill rises averaging 21% across England. Comparing actual increases against what Ofwat approved — several companies exceeding limits.
Water Bill Increases.human_focus: Helping 60 rioters apply for WaterSure (capped bills for low-income or medical-need households). 44 approved — average saving £180/year.
Water Bill Increases.name: Water Bill Increases

%Sewage in Rivers%.agent_helps: Monitors discharge alerts, cross-references company data with rioter reports, and compiles evidence for EA enforcement
%Sewage in Rivers%.human_helps: Connects rioters near the same waterways, organises beach and river testing days, and helps submit evidence to the Environment Agency
%Sewage in Rivers%.agent_focus: Cross-referencing Thames Water's self-reported discharge data with 200 rioter reports. Three outlets appear to be under-reporting by 60%+.
%Sewage in Rivers%.human_focus: Organised testing at 12 beaches this month. Results shared with Surfers Against Sewage and local media. Two beach warnings issued early because of our data.
%Sewage in Rivers%.name: %Sewage in Rivers%

Bank Branch Closures.agent_helps: Tracks planned closures, analyses impact assessments, and helps you respond to consultations with evidence
Bank Branch Closures.human_helps: Connects affected communities, shares successful approaches that reversed closures, and helps organise group responses
Bank Branch Closures.agent_focus: 12 HSBC closures announced this quarter. Analysing their impact assessments — 3 don't meet FCA requirements. Building challenges.
Bank Branch Closures.human_focus: Helped Barclays reverse a closure in Shrewsbury after 1,200 rioters attended the consultation. Sharing that playbook with other communities.
Bank Branch Closures.name: Bank Branch Closures

Hidden Bank Charges.agent_helps: Reviews your statements for unexpected fees, calculates total charges over time, and drafts refund requests
Hidden Bank Charges.human_helps: Shares which charges are most commonly refunded, connects rioters on the same bank, and helps escalate to the FOS
Hidden Bank Charges.agent_focus: Analysed 500 rioter statements. Average hidden charges: £127/year. Most common: arranged overdraft daily fees and foreign transaction markups.
Hidden Bank Charges.human_focus: Running a "statement audit" challenge — rioters checking 3 months of statements and flagging anything unexpected. 89 rioters found charges they didn't know about.
Hidden Bank Charges.name: Hidden Bank Charges

Fraud and Scam Losses.agent_helps: Reviews your case against the CRM code, drafts complaints to your bank, and helps escalate to the FOS if they refuse to reimburse
Fraud and Scam Losses.human_helps: Shares what approach works with each bank, connects rioters in similar situations, and provides emotional support — this one's tough
Fraud and Scam Losses.agent_focus: 65% of APP fraud victims are initially refused reimbursement. After our template complaints, 48% get reversed on appeal. Building FCA evidence.
Fraud and Scam Losses.human_focus: Running peer support for fraud victims. It's not just about the money — the shame and anxiety are real. 30 rioters helping each other through it.
Fraud and Scam Losses.name: Fraud and Scam Losses

Mortgage Rate Shock.agent_helps: Calculates your new payment, compares remortgage options, and helps you understand your timeline for switching
Mortgage Rate Shock.human_helps: Shares tips from rioters who've navigated the switch, connects people with similar situations, and helps reduce the panic
Mortgage Rate Shock.agent_focus: Average payment increase for rioters coming off 2-year fixes: £287/month. Comparing remortgage options across 12 lenders to find the best deals.
Mortgage Rate Shock.human_focus: Running a "remortgage buddy" system — pairing rioters who've just switched with those about to, so they can share what worked.
Mortgage Rate Shock.name: Mortgage Rate Shock

Overseas Transfer Fees.agent_helps: Compares transfer costs across banks and services, calculates what you're really paying in hidden FX markups, and suggests alternatives
Overseas Transfer Fees.human_helps: Shares which services actually give the best rates, connects rioters who send money to the same countries, and helps with bulk transfer planning
Overseas Transfer Fees.agent_focus: High street banks charge an average 3.5% FX markup on transfers vs 0.4% on specialist services. That's £310/year on a £750/month transfer.
Overseas Transfer Fees.human_focus: Built a comparison sheet of real costs for the top 10 transfer corridors. Updated monthly by rioters who actually use the services.
Overseas Transfer Fees.name: Overseas Transfer Fees

Insurance Claim Rejections.agent_helps: Reviews your policy wording against the rejection reason, identifies if the insurer is being unreasonable, and drafts appeal letters
Insurance Claim Rejections.human_helps: Shares common rejection loopholes, connects rioters who've successfully appealed with the same insurer, and helps escalate to the FOS
Insurance Claim Rejections.agent_focus: Analysing rejection patterns at Aviva, Admiral, and Direct Line. 'Wear and tear' is cited in 40% of home insurance rejections — often incorrectly.
Insurance Claim Rejections.human_focus: Connecting rioters who've had the same claim type rejected. When 5 people have the same story, it's a pattern, not a one-off.
Insurance Claim Rejections.name: Insurance Claim Rejections

NHS Waiting Times.agent_helps: Checks current wait times for your procedure, finds which hospitals have shorter lists, and helps you understand your options
NHS Waiting Times.human_helps: Shares tips for navigating the system, connects rioters waiting for the same procedure, and helps you ask the right questions
NHS Waiting Times.agent_focus: Average wait for the top 10 procedures rioters need. Hip replacement: 47 weeks. Cataract: 32 weeks. Mapping which hospitals are fastest.
NHS Waiting Times.human_focus: Helping rioters understand they can choose which hospital to be referred to. 12 rioters switched to shorter lists this month.
NHS Waiting Times.name: NHS Waiting Times

GP Appointment Access.agent_helps: Logs access problems, compiles data on call wait times and booking availability, and helps you escalate to the ICB
GP Appointment Access.human_helps: Shares which booking approaches work (online at midnight, walk-in, etc.), and helps rioters write to their practice manager
GP Appointment Access.agent_focus: Average rioter wait to see a GP: 18 days. 40% can't get through on the phone before lines close. Building a report for local ICBs.
GP Appointment Access.human_focus: Running a "what actually works" thread — rioters sharing real tips for getting appointments at their specific practice.
GP Appointment Access.name: GP Appointment Access

Dentist Availability.agent_helps: Searches for NHS dentists accepting patients in your area, tracks availability, and helps you register complaints about access
Dentist Availability.human_helps: Shares workarounds (dental schools, community clinics, emergency slots), and connects rioters in the same area to share intel
Dentist Availability.agent_focus: Only 3 in 10 NHS dental practices accepting new adult patients nationally. Built a live tracker for rioter areas — updated weekly.
Dentist Availability.human_focus: Helping rioters find alternatives when the answer is "no NHS dentists." Dental schools, community clinics, and the emergency dental service.
Dentist Availability.name: Dentist Availability

Mental Health Service Waits.agent_helps: Checks IAPT/talking therapy wait times in your area, finds what's available, and helps you understand the referral process
Mental Health Service Waits.human_helps: Shares what support is available while waiting, connects rioters to peer support, and helps navigate the system
Mental Health Service Waits.agent_focus: Average IAPT wait: 18 weeks. But it varies hugely — some areas are 6 weeks, others 40+. Mapping the postcode lottery.
Mental Health Service Waits.human_focus: Building a "while you wait" resource — free apps, helplines, peer groups, and self-referral options rioters can access right now.
Mental Health Service Waits.name: Mental Health Service Waits

Prescription Costs.agent_helps: Checks if you qualify for free prescriptions, calculates if a PPC would save you money, and tracks cost changes
Prescription Costs.human_helps: Shares tips on saving (PPCs, pharmacy first, generic alternatives), and connects rioters who feel the system is unfair
Prescription Costs.agent_focus: If you need 12+ items/year, a PPC saves money. But 40% of rioters who'd benefit don't have one. Running a calculator tool.
Prescription Costs.human_focus: Helping rioters check if they qualify for exemptions — many don't realise they're eligible. 23 rioters got free prescriptions they didn't know about.
Prescription Costs.name: Prescription Costs

Hospital Parking Charges.agent_helps: Checks your hospital's parking policy, identifies if you qualify for free or reduced parking, and helps appeal unfair charges
Hospital Parking Charges.human_helps: Shares which hospitals have free parking deals, connects rioters at the same hospital, and helps with appeals
Hospital Parking Charges.agent_focus: 67% of English hospital trusts still charge for parking. Mapping which trusts offer exemptions for regular visitors and long-term patients.
Hospital Parking Charges.human_focus: Helping rioters at frequent-visit hospitals (chemo, dialysis, rehab) apply for parking exemptions. 15 approved this month.
Hospital Parking Charges.name: Hospital Parking Charges

Rent Increases.agent_helps: Checks if your increase is legal, compares it to local market rates, and helps you challenge it via the proper channels
Rent Increases.human_helps: Shares negotiation tips, connects renters in the same area, and helps you understand your options under the Renters Reform Act
Rent Increases.agent_focus: Average rent increase reported by rioters: 11.2% vs inflation of 3.4%. Mapping increases by region to spot the worst areas.
Rent Increases.human_focus: Helping rioters understand what the Renters Reform Act actually changes for them. Running Q&A sessions over WhatsApp.
Rent Increases.name: Rent Increases

Noisy Neighbours.agent_helps: Helps you log noise incidents properly, drafts complaint letters to the council or housing association, and tracks response times
Noisy Neighbours.human_helps: Shares what actually works (and what doesn't), connects rioters with similar issues, and helps navigate mediation options
Noisy Neighbours.agent_focus: Average council response time to noise complaints: 23 days. But statutory nuisance investigations take 6+ months. Building a faster-response template.
Noisy Neighbours.human_focus: Helping rioters document noise properly — time-stamped logs, decibel readings, video evidence. The better the evidence, the faster the response.
Noisy Neighbours.name: Noisy Neighbours

Damp and Mould in Housing.agent_helps: Helps you document damp with photos and moisture readings, drafts formal complaints using Awaab's Law, and tracks landlord response
Damp and Mould in Housing.human_helps: Shares what evidence gets landlords to act, connects rioters with housing organisations, and helps escalate to the housing ombudsman
Damp and Mould in Housing.agent_focus: Since Awaab's Law, landlords must respond to damp within 14 days. Tracking compliance — 60% of rioters' landlords are breaching this.
Damp and Mould in Housing.human_focus: Built an evidence pack template that's been used by 47 rioters. 38 got repairs started within a month.
Damp and Mould in Housing.name: Damp and Mould in Housing

Shrinkflation.agent_helps: Tracks product size changes, calculates real per-unit price increases, and identifies the worst offenders
Shrinkflation.human_helps: Shares spotted examples, helps rioters find better-value alternatives, and coordinates social media callouts
Shrinkflation.agent_focus: Tracked 120 products that shrunk in the last 6 months. Average size reduction: 12%. Average price increase at the same time: 8%. Double hit.
Shrinkflation.human_focus: Running a "shrinkflation spotters" group — rioters photograph before/after packaging. The best ones get shared on social. Companies hate it.
Shrinkflation.name: Shrinkflation

Refund Difficulties.agent_helps: Checks your consumer protection entitlements, drafts refund request letters, and helps escalate to Trading Standards or your card issuer
Refund Difficulties.human_helps: Shares which retailers are easiest and hardest to get refunds from, and helps with chargeback and Section 75 claims
Refund Difficulties.agent_focus: Average time to resolve a refund complaint: 21 days. But Section 75 claims through your credit card take just 8 days on average.
Refund Difficulties.human_focus: Teaching rioters about Section 75 — if you paid by credit card, you have much stronger protection. Most people don't know this.
Refund Difficulties.name: Refund Difficulties

Fake Reviews.agent_helps: Analyses review patterns, identifies likely fakes, and helps you report them to platforms and Trading Standards
Fake Reviews.human_helps: Shares tips for spotting fake reviews, recommends trustworthy review sources, and helps rioters report problem sellers
Fake Reviews.agent_focus: Tested 500 Amazon products — 34% had detectable fake review patterns. Building a browser tool to flag suspicious listings.
Fake Reviews.human_focus: Running a "trusted rioter reviews" thread where real people share honest opinions. No incentives, no fakes.
Fake Reviews.name: Fake Reviews

Food Quality Decline.agent_helps: Tracks ingredient changes, compares nutritional labels over time, and compiles evidence of recipe reformulation
Food Quality Decline.human_helps: Shares taste-test comparisons, connects rioters who've noticed the same changes, and helps coordinate feedback to manufacturers
Food Quality Decline.agent_focus: Comparing ingredient lists on 50 popular ready meals from 2023 vs 2026. 60% have reduced meat content or switched to cheaper oils.
Food Quality Decline.human_focus: Running blind taste tests and sharing results. When 200 rioters say something tastes worse, that's data a manufacturer can't ignore.
Food Quality Decline.name: Food Quality Decline

Self-Checkout Frustration.agent_helps: Tracks which supermarkets are removing staffed tills, compiles customer feedback, and helps submit formal complaints
Self-Checkout Frustration.human_helps: Shares which stores still have staffed checkouts, connects rioters who prefer human service, and coordinates feedback to stores
Self-Checkout Frustration.agent_focus: Mapped staffed checkout availability at 200 supermarket locations. 40% have reduced to 2 or fewer staffed tills during peak hours.
Self-Checkout Frustration.human_focus: Running a "staffed tills matter" effort — helping rioters give feedback directly to their local store manager. 8 stores have added tills back.
Self-Checkout Frustration.name: Self-Checkout Frustration

Subscription Traps.agent_helps: Identifies if a free trial has auto-renewal hidden in the T&Cs, helps you cancel before charges start, and drafts refund requests
Subscription Traps.human_helps: Shares which free trials are genuine vs traps, helps rioters get refunds for unexpected charges, and flags the worst offenders
Subscription Traps.agent_focus: 67% of "free trial" sign-ups in our data auto-renew without a clear reminder email. Building a report for Trading Standards.
Subscription Traps.human_focus: Created a "free trial calendar" — rioters log when their trials end so they get reminded to cancel. No more surprise charges.
Subscription Traps.name: Subscription Traps

Delivery Problems.agent_helps: Tracks your delivery, helps you file complaints, identifies patterns by courier, and drafts refund claims
Delivery Problems.human_helps: Shares which couriers to avoid, what to say to get refunds faster, and connects rioters in the same area with the same courier
Delivery Problems.agent_focus: Evri has a 23% complaint rate among rioters — 3x higher than DPD. Building a delivery league table with real data.
Delivery Problems.human_focus: Created a "what to say" script for each major courier's complaints line. Rioters report 40% faster resolution using the scripts.
Delivery Problems.name: Delivery Problems

Pothole Damage.agent_helps: Logs your pothole with location and photos, tracks council response times, and helps you claim for vehicle damage
Pothole Damage.human_helps: Shares which councils actually fix things and how, connects rioters in the same area, and helps coordinate group reports
Pothole Damage.agent_focus: Average council response time to pothole reports: 34 days. But 20% never get fixed at all. Built a tracking dashboard by council area.
Pothole Damage.human_focus: Organised a "pothole safari" in the Valleys — 30 rioters mapped every pothole on their daily routes in one weekend. Council couldn't ignore 847 reports.
Pothole Damage.name: Pothole Damage

Council Tax Rises.agent_helps: Checks your council tax band, compares it to similar properties, and helps you challenge your banding if it's wrong
Council Tax Rises.human_helps: Shares which councils have the best and worst services for the money, and helps rioters respond to budget consultations
Council Tax Rises.agent_focus: 1 in 7 properties may be in the wrong council tax band. Built a comparison tool — 23 rioters have successfully challenged and got rebates.
Council Tax Rises.human_focus: Helping rioters understand where their council tax actually goes. When you know the numbers, the budget consultation response writes itself.
Council Tax Rises.name: Council Tax Rises

Rubbish Collection Changes.agent_helps: Tracks collection schedule changes, logs missed collections, and helps you submit complaints with evidence
Rubbish Collection Changes.human_helps: Shares tips on managing fortnightly collections, connects rioters in areas with the worst service, and helps escalate persistent issues
Rubbish Collection Changes.agent_focus: Missed collection reports from 200 rioters mapped by area. Three wards account for 60% of all complaints. Building a case for the scrutiny committee.
Rubbish Collection Changes.human_focus: Helping rioters in areas switching to fortnightly collections prepare. Created a waste reduction guide that actually works for families.
Rubbish Collection Changes.name: Rubbish Collection Changes

Planning Permission Abuse.agent_helps: Tracks planning applications in your area, helps you understand the process, and drafts objection letters with the right grounds
Planning Permission Abuse.human_helps: Connects affected neighbours, shares successful objection strategies, and helps rioters attend and speak at planning meetings
Planning Permission Abuse.agent_focus: Monitoring 340 active planning applications flagged by rioters. Created template objection letters covering the 8 most common valid grounds.
Planning Permission Abuse.human_focus: Helped residents in 4 areas coordinate planning objections. Two applications were refused after 50+ objections each.
Planning Permission Abuse.name: Planning Permission Abuse

Dog Fouling.agent_helps: Logs hotspot locations, tracks council enforcement response, and helps you report persistent offenders
Dog Fouling.human_helps: Connects concerned residents, shares what's worked in other areas (free bag dispensers, signage), and helps coordinate clean-ups
Dog Fouling.agent_focus: Mapped 89 dog fouling hotspots from rioter reports. Cross-referencing with council bin locations — 60% of hotspots have no bins within 100m.
Dog Fouling.human_focus: Organised 3 community clean-up days. More importantly, got the council to install 8 new dog waste bins at the worst hotspots.
Dog Fouling.name: Dog Fouling

Customer Service Hold Times.agent_helps: Logs your hold time, tracks company response averages, and helps you find faster ways to get through (email, chat, social)
Customer Service Hold Times.human_helps: Shares the best times to call each company, which channels get fastest responses, and connects rioters dealing with the same company
Customer Service Hold Times.agent_focus: Average hold time reported by rioters: 43 minutes. But it varies wildly — BT: 67 mins, Octopus Energy: 4 mins. Building a league table.
Customer Service Hold Times.human_focus: Created "best time to call" guides for the 20 most complained-about companies. Rioters contribute real data. Tuesdays 10am seems to be the sweet spot.
Customer Service Hold Times.name: Customer Service Hold Times

Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.agent_helps: Drafts cancellation requests, identifies which channels actually work for each company, and helps you avoid retention tricks
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.human_helps: Shares step-by-step cancellation guides for specific companies, and helps rioters who keep getting the runaround
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.agent_focus: Mapped the cancellation process for 30 companies. Average steps to cancel: 4.2. Worst offender: 9 steps including a "loyalty call."
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.human_focus: Built a "cancellation script" library — exact words to say to each company's retention team. Updated weekly by rioters who've just done it.
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.name: Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions

Cost of Childcare.agent_helps: Helps you understand your entitlements (15/30 free hours, Tax-Free Childcare), calculates what you should be paying, and checks provider charges
Cost of Childcare.human_helps: Connects parents in the same area, shares tips on accessing free hours, and helps navigate the application process
Cost of Childcare.agent_focus: Average rioter spends £1,100/month on childcare. But 30% aren't claiming all the free hours they're entitled to. Running a benefits check.
Cost of Childcare.human_focus: Helping parents navigate the 30 free hours application — it's confusing and the codes expire. 40 rioters got their hours sorted this month.
Cost of Childcare.name: Cost of Childcare

Student Loan Repayment.agent_helps: Calculates your real repayment amount, projects when (if ever) you'll pay it off, and helps you understand threshold changes
Student Loan Repayment.human_helps: Shares strategies for managing repayments, connects graduates with similar balances, and helps with overpayment refund claims
Student Loan Repayment.agent_focus: For Plan 2 borrowers, average projected repayment: 38 years before write-off. 83% will never fully repay. Built a calculator so rioters can see their own numbers.
Student Loan Repayment.human_focus: Helping rioters who've accidentally overpaid (earned under threshold but still charged) claim refunds. 12 refunds processed — average £340 each.
Student Loan Repayment.name: Student Loan Repayment

AI Replacing Jobs.agent_helps: Tracks which sectors are most affected, maps retraining options, and helps you understand what protections exist
AI Replacing Jobs.human_helps: Connects people in affected industries, shares reskilling resources, and helps coordinate responses to workplace AI changes
AI Replacing Jobs.agent_focus: Compiled data from 300 rioters on AI changes at their workplace. 40% say tasks have been automated with no consultation. Building a report.
AI Replacing Jobs.human_focus: Running peer support for rioters whose roles are changing. Sharing retraining resources and connecting people in the same industry.
AI Replacing Jobs.name: AI Replacing Jobs
